query: Rivian Redwood Materials energy storage partnership announcement April 2026 details manufacturing supply chain
a_issues: Content A has the core facts, but it is thinner on the manufacturing/supply-chain details. reasoning: Both sets contain the key answerable facts from reliable sources: Rivian and Redwood Materials announced an April 2026 partnership to deploy second-life battery storage at Rivian’s Normal, Illinois manufacturing facility; Rivian supplies more than 100 used battery packs; Redwood integrates them into a Redwood Energy system with Redwood Pack Manager; the initial system provides 10 MWh to reduce peak-demand costs and support grid reliability.
